model_type: scikit-learn Pipeline with StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder, and RandomForestClassifier
target_definition: 1 = ICU length of stay greater than 2 days; 0 = ICU length of stay 2 days or less
training_note: Trained offline on synthetic ICU-style data because MIMIC-IV cannot be shared on GitHub. This artifact is included only so reviewers can verify the inference workflow from a fresh clone.
